title: cyrtomium caryotideum var. anomophyllum
intro: Cyrtomium caryotideum var. anomophyllum, commonly known as the Japanese holly fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyrtomium caryotideum var. anomophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
